summary: Tested 3 critical bug fixes: Bot Difficulty Unlocking, Dollar Value Calculation, and Battle Replay. Backend APIs all working correctly (11/11 tests pass). Found and FIXED a bug in Battle Replay - round data (taps, effective values) was not being passed from TappingArena and RPSBidding to BattleArena for replay saving.

integration_issues.issue: FIXED - TappingArena and RPSBidding were not passing round data (playerTaps, opponentTaps, effectiveValues, rpsChoices) to onRoundComplete callback. Replays showed 0 taps and $0 values.

action_items: Verify the Battle Replay fix by playing a new bot battle and checking the replay shows correct tap counts and dollar values
The Bot Difficulty Unlock feature is working correctly - backend shows 13 easy wins, 3 medium wins, Hard is unlocked, Extreme shows 0/3 correctly
critical_code_review_comments: TappingArena.jsx lines 583-587 and 618-622: onRoundComplete was called with only winner string, not passing roundData object with taps/values - FIXED
RPSBidding.jsx lines 771-778: onRoundComplete was not passing RPS choice and bid data - FIXED
BattleArena.jsx line 1026-1030: handleRPSRoundComplete was not forwarding RPS data to handleRoundComplete - FIXED

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Bot Difficulty Selector working, Battle Replay page working, replay data fix applied

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with 13 easy_bot_wins, 3 medium_bot_wins
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bot battle unlock system is working correctly. The main fix was in the replay data saving - TappingArena and RPSBidding now pass round data (taps, effective values, RPS choices) to the onRoundComplete callback. Test by playing a new bot battle and verifying the replay shows correct values.

bug_1_bot_difficulty_unlock.details: Backend correctly tracks wins and unlocks. User has 13 easy wins (Medium unlocked), 3 medium wins (Hard unlocked), 0 hard wins (Extreme locked at 0/3). The onGameComplete fix from main agent is working.

bug_2_dollar_value_calculation.details: TappingArena.jsx has calculateEffectiveValue function that applies scenery, streak, level, age, likes modifiers. Values are calculated correctly.

bug_3_battle_replay_shows_nothing.root_cause: TappingArena and RPSBidding were calling onRoundComplete with only the winner string, not passing the roundData object containing playerTaps, opponentTaps, playerEffectiveValue, opponentEffectiveValue, rpsChoices, etc.
bug_3_battle_replay_shows_nothing.fix_applied: Updated onRoundComplete calls in TappingArena.jsx (lines 583-587, 618-622) and RPSBidding.jsx (lines 771-778) to pass complete round data. Updated handleRPSRoundComplete in BattleArena.jsx to forward RPS data.
bug_3_battle_replay_shows_nothing.verification: Existing replays show 0 taps/$0 values. New replays after fix should show correct values.
